proverb_amharic: ለሆድ ሲሉ ይሞቱ፤ ለክብር ሲሉ ይዋጉ።
proverb_english: They die for greed; they fight for honor.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ለክብሩና ለማንነቱ መቆም እንዳለበት ያስተምራል።
meaning_english: Emphasizes the importance of living with honor rather than greed.

proverb_english: One does not build a house for a past winter.
meaning_amharic: ያለፈ ነገርን ለመለወጥ መሞከር ትርጉም የለውም፤ ጊዜው ካለፈ በኋላ የሚደረግ ጥረት ፋይዳ እንደሌለው ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: It is useless to try to fix or worry about something that has already passed. It emphasizes the importance of focus on the present and future rather than regrets.

proverb_english: What is sent for the sinners overflows to the righteous.
meaning_amharic: መጥፎ ነገር ወይም ቅጣት ለአጥፊዎች ሲመጣ ንጹሃንም አብረው ሊነኩ እንደሚችሉ፤ ወይም ደግሞ ለአንዳንዶች የተረፈው ለሌሎችም እንደሚተርፍ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: When a trial or consequence comes for those who deserve it, the innocent nearby may also be affected. It also suggests that a blessing meant for some can reach everyone.

proverb_english: There is a time for everything.
meaning_amharic: ማንኛውም ነገር በራሱ ጊዜና ወቅት እንደሚከናወን፤ ትዕግስት አስፈላጊ መሆኑን የሚያስተምር ምሳሌ ነው።
meaning_english: Everything happens in its own season; patience is key because things cannot be rushed before their time.

proverb_english: A traveler has no permanent friend.
meaning_amharic: ሁልጊዜ ከአንድ ቦታ ወደ ሌላ ቦታ የሚንቀሳቀስ ወይም የማይረጋጋ ሰው ዘላቂ ወዳጅነት ለመመስረት እንደሚከብደው ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Someone who is always on the move or inconsistent finds it difficult to maintain deep, long-lasting relationships.

proverb_english: There is no comparison for a dream.
meaning_amharic: ህልም ረቂቅና የግል ስለሆነ ከእውነታው ዓለም ጋር በቀጥታ ሊነጻጸር እንደማይችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Dreams are subjective and unique; they cannot be easily compared to or explained by the logic of the waking world.

proverb_english: A master who went out to fight doesn't return just to eat.
meaning_amharic: አንድ ሰው ለትልቅ ዓላማ ወይም ለስራ ከወጣ ያሰበውን ሳይጨርስ ለጥቅም ወይም ለምቾት ብሎ መመለስ እንደሌለበት ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Once someone sets out for a significant mission or duty, they should not return or be distracted by minor comforts until the task is complete.

meaning_amharic: ጊዜያዊ ለሆነና ለማያልፍ ነገር ተብሎ ትልቅ ዋጋ መክፈል ወይም ቋሚ ንብረትን ማጣት ስህተት መሆኑን ያሳያል።
meaning_english: It highlights the folly of losing something permanent or valuable for the sake of something fleeting and temporary.

proverb_english: It is not difficult for the one who holds it.
meaning_amharic: አንድን ስራ ወይም ኃላፊነት ለሚወጣው ሰው ከውጭ ለሚያየው እንደሚመስለው ላይከብደው እንደሚችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Things often look much harder from the outside; the person actually doing the work finds a way to manage it.

proverb_english: One who comes to pick a fight will never lack an excuse.
meaning_amharic: ጠብ የሚፈልግ ሰው ጠብ ለመጀመር ሁልጊዜ ምክንያት እንደሚፈልግና እንደማያጣ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Someone looking for conflict will always find a reason or an excuse to justify their behavior.

proverb_english: To the person, more is added.
meaning_amharic: ያለው ሰው ላይ ይጨመርለታል፤ ወይም ደግሞ መልካም የሚያደርግ ሰው የበለጠ በረከት እንደሚያገኝ ያሳያል።
meaning_english: This suggests that abundance attracts abundance, or that those who act rightly receive further blessings.

proverb_english: Do not regret the past, and do not brag about the future.
meaning_amharic: ያለፈው አልፏልና መጸጸት ትርጉም የለውም፤ ስለሚመጣውም ገና ስላልታየ መመካት አይገባም የሚል ትልቅ ምክር ነው።
meaning_english: A piece of advice to not dwell on past mistakes that cannot be changed, and to remain humble about the future which has not yet arrived.
